Projected Metrics

Projected Impact Metrics

Section titled “Projected Impact Metrics”

All metrics below are targets based on the 44-week roadmap. Metrics marked as projections require pilot validation before publication as performance data.

These are targets, not guarantees

Regulatory interpretations should be confirmed by local counsel before launch. Financial projections depend on MFI capital commitments and cooperative adoption rates that are subject to external factors.

Farmer Impact Targets

Section titled “Farmer Impact Targets”
MetricPhase 1 (Month 6)Phase 2 (Month 12)Phase 3 (Month 18)
Registered farmers2002,00010,000
Active loans505003,000
Average loan size (USDC)$150$300$450
Loans auto-repaid504502,700
Default rate (target)< 5%< 3%< 2%
Average payment time< 60 seconds< 60 seconds< 60 seconds
Farmer income uplift vs. informal credit40–60%40–60%40–60%

Protocol Metrics

Section titled “Protocol Metrics”
MetricPhase 1Phase 2Phase 3
LendingVault TVL (USDC)$50,000$500,000$3,000,000
MFI partners0 (grant funded)1–24–5
Active cooperatives135
DDS documents generated5–1050–80200+
BatchTokens minted~500~5,000~25,000
Hedera HCS messages~4,000~40,000~200,000
Annual protocol revenue (USDC)$0 (grant)$18,000–20,000$138,000–144,000

EUDR Impact Targets

Section titled “EUDR Impact Targets”
MetricPhase 2Phase 3
GPS-verified farms2,00010,000
EUDR-compliant DDS filed50–80/season200+/season
Export volume covered (kg)~500,000 kg~2,500,000 kg
Cost per DDS (vs. consultant)$15–40$15–40
Cost saving vs. paper-based DDS$1,600–7,600/coop/season$1,600–7,600/coop/season

MFI Economics Targets

Section titled “MFI Economics Targets”
MetricTarget
MFI yield (APY on USDC)8–10%
Borrower APR14–18%
AsiliChain protocol margin4%
Credit loss reserve1–2%
Auto-repayment rate (target)> 97%
Collection cost for MFI$0 (auto-repayment)

Benchmark: EthicHub Comparison

Section titled “Benchmark: EthicHub Comparison”

EthicHub has deployed $5M to 10,000+ farmers across 6 countries since 2018 — the closest structural precedent for on-chain agricultural lending.

MetricEthicHub (actual)AsiliChain (Phase 3 target)
Farmers served10,000+10,000
Capital deployed$5M$3M
Countries61 (Uganda)
Default rateReported < 2%Target < 2%
Compliance functionNoneEUDR DDS auto-generation
Auto-repaymentNoYes (EXPORTED event)
Government data integrationNoMAAIF NTS primary path

Uganda Coffee Sector Context

Section titled “Uganda Coffee Sector Context”
StatisticValueSource
Smallholder farmers (Uganda)3.5 millionUCDA 2024
Uganda coffee exports FY2024-25USD 2.4 billionUCDA 2025
Uganda share of African production~12%ICO 2024
Farmers with formal credit access< 10%FinScope Uganda 2023
Informal lender APR60–120%Field research
EUDR enforcement deadlineDecember 30, 2026EU 2023/1115
Uganda coffee exported to Europe~70%UCDA 2024
